creator: des@FreeBSD.org
text: Can we please move forward on this?  I can guarantee you that if you try to commit or submit a patch to make the kernel lie about the stripe size, the GEOM / CAM / ATA maintainers will tell you to go pound sand.  If the problem is that you don't want bsdinstall to use a different default alignment than gpart, then heck, let's apply the same patch to gpart.  But we NEED THIS.  It will go in, one way or the other.
